channel.title: Recent & Upcoming Talks on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Recent & Upcoming Talks on Soyoung Choi

item.title: 23rd HFSA Annual Scientific Meeting
item.description: Soyoung’s scholarly work has been accepted for oral presentation in the Nursing Investigator Award Session. This study is one of six selected for presentation. In addition to presenting this research in the award session, it will also be displayed as an award poster in the Exhibit Hall.

item.title: 31st ENRS Annual Scientific Sessions
item.description: Soyoung’s “Heart Failure Research Using Text Mining: A Systematic Review” study was presented on Thursday Afternoon, April 4, 2018 from 3:30 pm-4:30 pm.

item.title: 34th CSUN Assistive Technology Conference
item.description: The biggest assistive technology conference all over the world.

item.title: Korean Society of Adult Nursing Conference Spring 2019
item.description: Soyoung’s “A Global Snapshot of Simulation-based Learning in Nursing Education” study was presented on Friday, May 24, 2019 from noon-1:30 pm.

item.title: Nursing Theory: A 50 Year Perspective, Past and Future
item.description: Soyoung’s concept analysis of caregiver burden in palliative care was presented in Nursing Theory Conference (Thursday, March 21 & Friday, March 22, 2019).
